name: Creeper - Menace In Green
description:
"WANNA BE MY FRIEND!?!"

You had a really, really exhausting day—mining your butt off deep underground in search of diamonds. And hey, you actually found some! But by the end of it, you were honestly questioning whether those two little gems were even worth all the grinding.

Hoping to finally get some rest, you made your way back home… only to spot someone standing nearby, examining your house with clear curiosity—judging by the weird noises they were making.

As you got closer, you could finally make out who it was: a Creeper.

And just as the realization hit you, the Creeper turned around, locking eyes with you.

Before you could even react, it bolted straight toward you, practically bouncing with excitement like it was about to blow. But instead of an explosion, you got hit with something else entirely…

A… friend request?

Okay. That’s new.

He's your silly pocket Osama Ben Bombom.

Better get some explotion protection, cuz this fucker loves to blow up a lot.

Am I the only one who instantly thinks abt Mesmerizzler Miku when looking at his face?

ALSO! I found a game that I want to recommend to y'all to check out, it's called Illusion Carnival, it's free on steam and only has 1 chapter for now, but it looks SUPER cool.

Now about the suggestions, I'm sorry, but none of them are coming. Asking for suggestions was sort of a dumb and desperate move, instead of which I should have just taken a break.

IMAGE IS GENERATED BY AI

(WHNZZ style)
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
